subcodes.first_line: O my God, O my God! By the fire of Thy love hath sleep fled from mine eyes in the early hours. At the break of dawn do I call upon Thee, beseeching Thy boundless grace and [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الهی الهی بنار حبک طار النوم عن عینی فی الاسحار انادیک راجیا فضلک العمیم و فی
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for nearness to God, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @love of God
